title: Retrofit: calling the backend
objective: See how ApiService turns Kotlin function calls into real HTTP requests.

body.p: ApiService is just an interface with no method bodies. Retrofit reads the annotations (@GET, @POST) and generates a real implementation at runtime.
NetworkModule reads BuildConfig.BASE_URL, set per build type in build.gradle.kts — debug points at 10.0.2.2 (the emulator's alias for your computer), release points at your deployed server.

lineNotes: suspend fun — this call pauses without blocking the UI thread.
@Body log: LogRequest — serialized to JSON automatically and sent as the request body.

quiz.q: Why is ApiService just an interface with no method bodies?
options: Retrofit generates the real networking implementation from the annotations at runtime
Kotlin requires interfaces for all classes
